# AIBfamily — Safe AI for Kids Ages 4-15
> Parental control AI platform. 5-layer AIBguard protection. Real-time crisis detection. No child accounts ever.

## Key facts
- Pricing: Family Starter $9.99/mo, Family Plus $19.99/mo, Family Premium $34.99/mo
- Compliance: COPPA, UK Children's Code, GDPR Article 8, EU AI Act
- Contact: support@aibfamily.cloud
